# TransferLink Interactive Workflow Guide This guide maps the screens on your canvas to the specific clinical and operational flows for each user role. ### 1. LTC Nurse: Initiating a Transfer *The flow from identifying a patient to physical handoff.* * **S15: Login & Onboarding** → **S17: Facility Dashboard** (Oversight) * **S1: Patient List** → **S2: Patient Record (LTC View)** (Clinical Review) * **S3: Initiate Transfer** (Emergency Form) → **S4: Transfer Confirmation** * **S5: QR Code Generated** (Handoff Hero) → **S6: Print Preview** (Paper backup) ### 2. EMS Crew: En-Route Care *Accessing life-saving data in the field.* * **S7: QR Scanner (EMS)** → **S8: Patient Record (EMS View)** * *Key highlights:* Large DNR/DNI banner, Expanded Comfort Section, POLST access. ### 3. ED Staff: Hospital Intake & Discharge *Receiving the patient and closing the loop.* * **S9: QR Scanner (ED)** → **S10: Patient Record (ED View)** * **S11: ED Return Form** (Diagnosis & Vitals) → **S12: Transfer Complete** (Sync confirmation) ### 4. Charge Nurse / Admin: Return & Audit *Monitoring outcomes and safety.* * **S13: Facility Return Record** (Closed loop data) → **S14: Transfer Timeline** (Audit trail) * **S18: Transfer History** (30-day log) * **S19: SBAR Handoff Report** (Standardized communication) ### 5. Admission: Patient Intake *Building the digital foundation.* * **Steps 1-5 (Screens S28, S34, S21, S22, S15)**: Guided collection of demographics, baseline vitals, and person-centered care preferences. All these screens are currently active on your canvas and ready for review.
